futureLaneSignals.quote: Graduate Medical EducationAt AdventHealth, we believe that exceptional physicians don’t just heal patients—they transform communities. Through rigorous training, hands-on experience, and mission-driven service, our Graduate Medical Education programs prepare the next generation of doctors to lead with skill, compassion, and whole-person care.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: AdventHealth runs Graduate Medical Education programs for resident physicians.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Visa Sponsorship: H-1B Specialty Occupation
futureLaneSignals.claimText: AdventHealth GME benefits page lists H-1B Specialty Occupation visa sponsorship.

futureLaneSignals.quote: To qualify as an H-1B holding Medical Resident you MUST pass all three steps of Medical Licensing Examination (USLME) prior to AdventHealth filing your H1B petition.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: H-1B eligibility for residents requires passing all three USMLE steps before AdventHealth files the petition.

futureLaneSignals.quote: H-1B visa holders can obtain permanent residency (green card) through AdventHealth once an offer of future employment is established.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: H-1B holders may pursue green card sponsorship through AdventHealth upon future employment offer.
